onboarding.subtitle: Master the Indian election process with your personal AI assistant.

voter_selection.title: Is this your first time voting?
voter_selection.subtitle: We'll tailor your experience to make it simple and stress-free.
voter_selection.yes_desc: I need help with everything from registration to the booth.
voter_selection.no_desc: I just need a quick status check and booth info.

dashboard.complete_profile: Complete your profile to be 100% ready
dashboard.first_timer_guidance: Since it's your first time, we've highlighted the most critical steps for you. Don't worry, it's simpler than it looks!

journey.title: Your Journey
journey.subtitle: Follow these steps to ensure you're ready.

registration.title: Voter Registration
registration.desc: Fill Form 6 on NVSP portal to register as a new voter.

verification.title: Document Verification
verification.desc: Your local BLO will visit for physical verification of your documents.

booth.title: Find Polling Booth
booth.desc: Locate your designated polling station on the ECI website.

vote.title: Cast Your Vote
vote.desc: Head to your booth with your EPIC card and cast your vote.

tips.registration: FIRST-TIMER TIP: Keep your Aadhaar and a clear passport-size photo ready before starting Form 6.
tips.verification: FIRST-TIMER TIP: The BLO will call you before visiting. Keep your originals handy for quick verification.
tips.booth: FIRST-TIMER TIP: Booths are usually in schools or community halls nearby. Check the map a day before.
tips.vote: FIRST-TIMER TIP: Don't forget your ink mark! It's a badge of honor for every citizen.

documents.title: Document Checklist
documents.subtitle: Ensure you have these documents ready for verification.
documents.kcy_alert: Make sure your mobile number is linked with your Aadhaar for faster e-KYC during verification.

aadhar.title: Aadhaar Card
aadhar.desc: Required for identity and age proof.

voter-id.title: Voter ID (if any)
voter-id.desc: Existing EPIC card if you are already registered.

address-proof.title: Address Proof
address-proof.desc: Electricity bill, Gas connection, or Bank passbook.

eligibility.title: Eligibility Check
eligibility.subtitle: Let's see if you can vote in the next election.
eligibility.registered_question: Are you already registered to vote?
eligibility.desc_eligible: Congratulations! You are eligible to vote in the upcoming elections.
eligibility.desc_not_eligible: Unfortunately, you do not meet the criteria to vote yet.
eligibility.reason_age: You must be at least 18 years old to vote.
eligibility.reason_citizen: Only Indian citizens are eligible to vote.
eligibility.next_step_documents: Keep your Aadhaar and address proof ready

timeline.title: Election Timeline
timeline.subtitle: Key dates for the 2026 General Elections

chat.welcome: Hello! I am your Civic AI assistant. How can I help you today?

suggestions.register: How do I register to vote?

booth_finder.title: Find My Booth
booth_finder.subtitle: Enter your PIN code to locate your designated polling station.
booth_finder.no_results: No booths found for this PIN code.

myth_fact.title: Myth vs Fact
myth_fact.subtitle: Busting common election rumors with verified facts.

item1.myth: I have a Voter ID card, so I can definitely vote.
item1.fact: Having an EPIC card is not enough. Your name MUST be present in the official Electoral Roll to vote.

item2.myth: I can vote from any polling station in my city.
item2.fact: No. You can only vote at the specific polling booth assigned to you in the voter list.

item3.myth: Registered voters can vote online from home.
item3.fact: Currently, the ECI does not provide an online voting facility for general citizens. You must visit your booth.

help_others.title: Help Someone Vote
help_others.subtitle: Share the simple 4-step process with friends and family to ensure everyone's voice is heard.
help_others.modal_subtitle: Empower your community by sharing essential voting information.
help_others.share_message:
🗳️ *Voting Guide 2026*

1. Register: Fill Form 6 at voters.eci.gov.in
2. Verify: Keep documents ready for BLO visit
3. Locate: Find your booth via EPIC number
4. Vote: Visit booth on election day!

Help your community vote: {link}

🗳️ *My Voting Checklist*

I've prepared my documents for the 2026 Elections. Prepare yours and get ready to vote: {link}

help_others.share_guide_msg: 📘 Here is a simple step-by-step guide to voting in the 2026 Elections. Share it with anyone who needs help: {link}
